title: spec-to-ship outcome event
description: Emitted once per story when the execution loop finishes it. This record IS the quality-per-dollar numerator. It is the interface consumed by Token-Efficiency, which joins it to token/$ usage by builder_model + time to compute quality per dollar. The numerator is the accepted OUTCOME, never lines of code.

roadmap_outcome.description: Parent roadmap milestone id — the value this traces to (the Goodhart guard).

accepted.description: True only if acceptance criteria passed AND the review gate passed. This is the unit counted in the numerator.

review_verdict.description: Outcome of the adversarial review gate (Codex/Grok/Claude).

security_sensitive.description: If true, the FULL review gate was required (set at Stage 4).

iterations.description: build->gate loops to pass. The rework multiplier — high values mean low Effective-Token fraction.

builder_model.description: e.g. minimax-m3, kimi-k2.7-code, glm-5.2, deepseek-v4-pro. The join key to token/$ data.

net_loc_delta.description: DIAGNOSTIC ONLY — never the numerator. Read INVERSELY: less code for the same accepted outcome is better. Negative (code removed) that still passes is a quality win.

ponytail_simplified.description: Did the ponytail gate remove bloat / argue code away on this story?
